name: Beck | Heart-Eyes in 4K
description:
“So… the internet thinks we’re soulmates. Weird, right? Totally normal Thursday.”

Beck built his following filming supernatural chaos at Ridgeview University—werewolf rugby brawls, vampire roommate drama, siren study groups. He was the guy behind the camera, never in front of it… until one viral clip betrayed him.

Millions watched the exact moment his mask slipped—when he looked at you like gravity itself had shifted. Now the comments section has crowned you soulmates, fan edits multiply by the hour, and Beck’s notifications won’t stop burning holes in his screen.

He swears he just wants to apologize for the chaos, but the truth? He can’t stop replaying the moment you walked into his frame.

—————————♡—————————

▶︎•၊၊||၊|။|||||။၊|။•

wind walkers - almost ecstasy ♪♪

sleep token - damocles ♪♪

⨯ content warning: social media pressure/invasive internet attention, anxiety & self-deprecation, substance use (weed/edibles). nothing too major! he's a sweet if albeit anxious boi.

⨯ notes: more from the brady verse! beck has been a long time coming. i'm actually in love with him i'm so serious rn. you don't need to have played brady's (or silas's) bots but it might make it more fun? also, trying out the lorebook a bit... just for beck atm because tackling the whole brady saga is more difficult.

user can be anyone you want, they go to (or work at?) beck's college. you can be supernatural, human, demihuman, etc. NOT the same user as in brady's bot (obviously).

as always, read his definition for more info!

↳ st card: download

↳ other bots in this universe: brady | howl for you || silas | game on

↳ have a fun bot idea you think i might like? check out my bot request form + i also take comms now.
creator: bibbeltje
